title: MIGRATION.md helpful-error example differs from actual error text
description: MIGRATION.md lines 50-51 show the error as 'URI uses the old `secretx://backend/path` format' but the code (secretx-core/src/lib.rs line 1098) emits 'URI uses the old `secretx:backend:path` format'. A user who gets the error and searches MIGRATION.md will see a different string — harder to confirm they found the right doc. Fix: update MIGRATION.md after fixing the code error message.
